text: The tenant shall pay rent on the first day of each month. If payment is more than five days late, the landlord may charge a reasonable late fee as allowed by law. The landlord must provide written notice before entering the rental property except in an emergency. The tenant must keep all security codes and building access information confidential. Either party may terminate this agreement after a material breach and written notice. The landlord shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages except where prohibited by law. The tenant must keep the rental property clean and avoid causing damage.
